fires.name: Biobío–Ñuble Fires
fires.summary: Swept through south-central Chile in January 2026, killing 21 people and forcing 50,000 to evacuate. State of catastrophe declared. 325 homes destroyed across two regions.

fires.name: January 2026 Victorian Bushfires
fires.summary: One of Australia's worst seasons since Black Summer. 400,000 ha burned across Victoria including 137,000 ha at Longwood. 900 structures destroyed, A$100M federal aid pledged.

fires.name: Chubut–Los Alcerces Fires
fires.summary: Burned through Patagonian lake district near Cholila, El Bolsón, and Los Alcerces National Park in January 2026. Climate attribution studies found fire weather made three times more likely by climate change.

fires.name: Nebraska Wildfires
fires.summary: Large wildfires consuming nearly 800,000 acres across Nebraska as of mid-March 2026 amid warm, dry conditions and elevated wildfire risk.

fires.name: Colorado Wildfires (March 2026)
fires.summary: Multiple active wildfires burning in southern Colorado including near Colorado Springs with Highway 115 closed. Evacuations partially lifted as fire activity continues with warm conditions increasing risk.

news.title: Large wildfire burning south of Colorado Springs
Evacuations partially lifted as officials give updates on 3 wildfires burning in southern Colorado
Highway 115 fire blows up, road closed south of Colorado Springs

fires.name: Biggar Fire
fires.summary: New wildfire reported in Mendocino County, California on March 20, 2026 amid elevated fire risk.

news.title: Breaking: Biggar Fire reported in Mendocino County on March 20

fires.name: La Pine Wildfire
fires.summary: Wildfire near La Pine with evacuation orders dropped though investigation continues. Rural fire district halting all debris burning amid elevated wildfire risk and warm weather.

news.title: Evacuation orders dropped for wildfire near La Pine, though investigation continues

fires.name: Hawaii Wildfire Burn Scars
fires.summary: Hawaii bracing for more rain as storms hit previous wildfire burn scars, creating flood and erosion risks in March 2026.

news.title: Hawaii braces for more rain as storms hit wildfire burn scars
